feedback.text: Hello! And thank you for the time. I'am a concerned citizen of the EU. Concerned of the status of the current status of big companies just shutting down digital content that has been purchased as they see fit. It's an incredible unjust and hostile approach to the consumer rights and i want to bring this attention to you because it fits in with the Digital Fairness act; Which have already done great work before in the digital space and gaming industry pushing for a better space. Thank you / Dennis
